_about: DEEP IMMUNE + ONCOLOGY corpus 2026-05-01. The body's defense LATTICE + cancer as defense-failure-and-takeover. Mechanism + diagnostics + treatment + frontier therapies.
innate_immunity: Innate immunity is operator-FIRST-LINE-FAST-RESPONSE; barriers + complement + neutrophils + macrophages + NK cells + DCs.
Skin + mucosa = operator-PHYSICAL-LATTICE-BARRIERS; unbroken epithelium prevents most pathogen entry.

Complement is operator-CASCADE-of-plasma-proteins; classical (antibody-triggered) lectin (sugar-pattern) alternative (spontaneous on pathogen surface) all converge to MAC + opsonization + chemoattraction.
Neutrophils are operator-FIRST-RESPONDER-cells; phagocytose pathogens, release granules, NETosis (extracellular DNA traps); short-lived (hours).
Macrophages are operator-RESIDENT-PHAGOCYTES; eat debris + pathogens, present antigens, secrete cytokines; tissue-specific subtypes (alveolar microglia Kupffer).
NK cells are operator-MISSING-SELF-DETECTORS; kill cells lacking MHC-I (often virus-infected or tumor); independent of antibody.
Dendritic cells are operator-BRIDGE-INNATE-TO-ADAPTIVE; sample tissues, migrate to lymph node, present antigen to T cells.
Toll-like receptors (TLRs) are operator-PATTERN-RECOGNITION-RECEPTORS; detect PAMPs (pathogen-associated molecular patterns) like LPS, ssRNA, dsDNA.
Inflammatory response is operator-LATTICE-of-rubor-tumor-calor-dolor (redness swelling heat pain); dilated vessels + leaky capillaries + immune cell influx.
Cytokines + chemokines are operator-IMMUNE-MESSENGERS; IL-6 IL-1 TNF + IL-10 + interferons; orchestrate response.
adaptive_immunity: Adaptive immunity is operator-SLOW-SPECIFIC-MEMORY-RESPONSE; T cells + B cells; develops over days, lasts decades.
T cell receptor (TCR) is operator-RECOGNIZES-PEPTIDE-IN-MHC; ~10^15 unique TCRs generated by V(D)J recombination per individual.
MHC class I presents operator-INTRACELLULAR-PEPTIDES; on all nucleated cells; viewed by CD8+ T cells.
MHC class II presents operator-EXTRACELLULAR-PEPTIDES; on professional APCs; viewed by CD4+ T cells.
CD4+ helper T cells are operator-COORDINATORS; Th1 (cellular immunity) Th2 (humoral) Th17 (mucosal) Treg (suppressive) subsets.
CD8+ cytotoxic T cells are operator-KILLERS; recognize MHC-I-peptide on target cell, induce apoptosis via perforin + granzymes + Fas.
B cell receptor is operator-MEMBRANE-BOUND-ANTIBODY; recognizes free antigen, signals B cell activation + differentiation.
Antibody (immunoglobulin) is operator-Y-SHAPED-RECOGNITION-PROTEIN; IgG IgM IgA IgE IgD classes; specific to one epitope.
Antibody functions: operator-NEUTRALIZE (block) + opsonize (mark for phagocytosis) + activate complement + ADCC (NK cell killing).
Affinity maturation is operator-IN-GERMINAL-CENTER-EVOLUTION; somatic hypermutation + selection produces higher-affinity antibodies.
Immune memory: operator-MEMORY-T-AND-B-CELLS persist after infection; faster + stronger response on re-exposure (basis of vaccines).
cancer_mechanism: Cancer is operator-COLLAPSE-of-cellular-control; 6-10 hallmarks: sustained proliferation + evading growth suppressors + resisting cell death + replicative immortality + angiogenesis + invasion/metastasis + reprogramming energy + evading immune destruction + genome instability + tumor-promoting inflammation.
Oncogenes are operator-ACCELERATOR-genes mutated to gain-of-function; Ras Myc HER2 each drive proliferation when activated.
Tumor suppressors are operator-BRAKES-mutated to loss-of-function; p53 RB BRCA1/2 each release control when both alleles lost.
DNA repair genes (BRCA, MMR, NER) when broken cause operator-INCREASED-MUTATION-RATE; cancer often follows.
Cell cycle dysregulation: operator-LATTICE-OF-CHECKPOINTS broken; G1/S checkpoint via p53-RB axis most common failure.
Apoptosis evasion is operator-DEATH-PATHWAY-DISRUPTION; Bcl-2 overexpression or p53 loss let damaged cells survive.
Angiogenesis is operator-NEW-BLOOD-VESSEL-RECRUITMENT; VEGF + others; tumors switch on this to sustain growth.
Metastasis is operator-LATTICE-of-EMT (epithelial-mesenchymal transition) + circulation + colonization; majority of cancer deaths from metastasis.
Tumor microenvironment is operator-LATTICE-of-stromal-immune-vascular cells around tumor; influences progression + treatment response.
Driver vs passenger mutations: operator-CAUSAL-vs-incidental; tumors typically have ~5-10 drivers + thousands of passengers.
Cancer staging (TNM) is operator-LATTICE-OF-extent-tumor + nodes + metastasis; guides treatment + prognosis.
diagnostics_and_treatment: Imaging modalities: operator-CT (X-ray) MRI (magnetic) PET (functional metabolism) ultrasound (sound); each operator-FORCE-PROFILE different.
Biopsy is operator-TISSUE-SAMPLE for histology; punch shave excisional core; gold-standard for cancer diagnosis.
Liquid biopsy is operator-BLOOD-BASED-DETECTION of circulating tumor DNA + cells; less invasive, lower sensitivity for early cancer.
Genomic profiling: operator-LATTICE-of-mutations + expression + methylation; guides targeted therapy selection.
Surgery is operator-PHYSICAL-EXCISION; gold-standard for localized solid tumors; margins matter.
Radiation is operator-IONIZING-DAMAGE; targets dividing cells preferentially; fractionated to spare normal tissue.
Chemotherapy is operator-CYTOTOXIC-AGENTS; alkylating + antimetabolites + topoisomerase inhibitors + microtubule + others; broad action.
Targeted therapy is operator-MOLECULAR-PRECISION; imatinib for CML BCR-ABL; trastuzumab for HER2+ breast; many tyrosine kinase inhibitors.
Immunotherapy unlocks operator-IMMUNE-RECOGNITION-OF-TUMOR; checkpoint inhibitors (anti-PD1, anti-CTLA4) + CAR-T + cancer vaccines.
Hormone therapy is operator-DEPRIVE-HORMONE-DEPENDENT-TUMOR; aromatase inhibitors for ER+ breast; ADT for prostate.
Combination therapy is operator-LATTICE-of-multi-modality; surgery + chemo + radiation + immunotherapy concurrently or sequentially.
frontier_oncology: CAR-T cell therapy: operator-PATIENT-T-CELLS-ENGINEERED to recognize tumor antigen; revolutionary for some hematologic cancers, expensive + side-effects (CRS).
Bispecific antibodies: operator-2-TARGETS-ON-1-MOLECULE; one arm engages T cell, other arm engages tumor; redirects T cell killing.
Antibody-drug conjugates: operator-TARGETED-DELIVERY of cytotoxic payload; trastuzumab-emtansine, sacituzumab.
Tumor-infiltrating lymphocyte (TIL) therapy: operator-EXPAND-PATIENT-OWN-T-CELLS that found their way to tumor.
Personalized neoantigen vaccines: operator-TARGET-PATIENT-SPECIFIC-MUTATIONS; mRNA delivery; emerging clinical evidence.
Cancer-microbiome axis: operator-GUT-BACTERIA-MODULATE-IMMUNE-AND-TREATMENT-RESPONSE; FMT improves checkpoint inhibitor response in some.
Liquid biopsy for early detection: operator-MULTI-CANCER-EARLY-DETECTION (MCED) tests; Galleri claims detection of 50+ cancers from blood.
AI in oncology: operator-DEEP-LEARNING-on-pathology-imaging-genomics; pattern detection + prognosis prediction + treatment recommendation.
Tumor heterogeneity is operator-LATTICE-OF-SUBCLONES; treatment can select for resistant subclones; combination + sequential therapy address.
Survivorship is operator-POST-TREATMENT-CARE; long-term effects of therapy + surveillance + psychosocial support; growing population (~17M cancer survivors US).
Cancer prevention: operator-LATTICE-of-modifiable-risk; smoking obesity alcohol UV exposure infections (HPV HBV) account for ~40% preventable.
directive: Immune system + cancer share operator-LATTICE; cancer often reflects immune evasion failure.
When user describes cancer concerns, CK can describe mechanism + treatment classes + emerging therapies + emphasize professional consultation.
Empathic register fires when user discloses cancer in self/loved-one; presence + information + resources, not minimization or false reassurance.
CK can reference reputable resources: NCI cancer.gov, MSK Memorial Sloan Kettering, top academic medical centers; never specific provider recommendations.
